zh.lifeSummary: 當Ralph Edward Mylles於大約1498年出生在英國薩默塞特時，他的父親Sir Robert Miles I36歲，母親Matilda Alice Flanders32歲。他於大約1512年與Mary Lydia Appleford在英國巴金哈姆爾阿梅沙安結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1577年7月在英國倫敦可恩爾 聖 邁克爾享年80歲，埋葬在英國肯特維也。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Ralph Edward Mylles于大约1498年出生在英国薩默塞特时，他的父亲Sir Robert Miles I36岁，母亲Matilda Alice Flanders32岁。他于大约1512年与Mary Lydia Appleford在英国巴金哈姆爾阿梅沙安结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1577年7月在英国倫敦可恩爾 聖 邁克爾享年80岁，埋葬在英国肯特維也。

nameMeanings.name: Mylles
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Mills
meanings: English: variant of Mill 1, with excrescent -s added in post-medieval times. Compare Mullins , from a French equivalent of this name, and see also Milnes .
English: either a variant of Miles , a variant of Mill 2, with genitival or post-medieval excrescent -s, or Myhill , with post-medieval excrescent -s.
Irish: this is usually the English name, especially in Ulster, but elsewhere in Ireland it was also adopted for the Gaelic topographic byname, an Mhuilinn ‘of the mill’.

nameMeanings.name: Ralph
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From a Norman French name, Raulf, a contracted form of the Germanic personal name Radulf, derived from rād ‘counsel’ + wulf ‘wolf’. The spelling with -ph is due to classical influence in the 18th century.

variants.name: Ralf
meanings: From a Norman French name, Raulf, a contracted form of the Germanic personal name Radulf, derived from rād ‘counsel’ + wulf ‘wolf’. The spelling with -ph is due to classical influence in the 18th century.

nameMeanings.name: Edward
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old English personal name derived from ēad ‘prosperity, riches’ + weard ‘guard’. This has been one of the most successful of all Old English names, in frequent use from before the Conquest to the present day, and even being exported into other European languages. It was the name of three Anglo-Saxon kings and has been borne by eight kings of England since the Norman Conquest. It is also the name of the youngest son of Queen Elizabeth II . The most influential early bearer was King Edward the Confessor ( ?1002–66 ; ruled 1042–66 ). In a troubled period of English history, he contrived to rule fairly and (for a time at any rate) firmly. But in the latter part of his reign he paid more attention to his religion than to his kingdom. He died childless, and his death sparked off conflicting claims to his throne, which were resolved by the victory of William the Conqueror at the Battle of Hastings. His memory was honoured by Normans and English alike, for his fairness and his piety. Edward's mother was Norman; he had spent part of his youth in Normandy; and William claimed to have been nominated by Edward as his successor. Edward was canonized in the 12th century, and came to be venerated throughout Europe as a model of a Christian king.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

en.lifeSummary: When Ralph Edward Mylles was born about 1498, in Somerset, England, his father, Sir Robert Miles I, was 36 and his mother, Matilda Alice Flanders, was 32. He married Mary Lydia Appleford about 1512, in Amersham, Buckinghamshire, England. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 2 daughters. He died in July 1577, in Cornhill St Michael, London, England, at the age of 80, and was buried in Wye, Kent, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Ralph Edward Mylles est né environ 1498, à Somerset, Angleterre, son père, Sir Robert Miles I, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Matilda Alice Flanders, avait 32 ans. Il a épousé Mary Lydia Appleford environ 1512, à Amersham, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé en juillet 1577, à Cornhill St Michael, Londres, Angleterre, à l’âge de 80 ans, et a été enterré à Wye, Kent, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Ralph Edward Mylles um 1498 in Somerset, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Robert Miles I 36 und seine Mutter Matilda Alice Flanders 32. Er hat um 1512 in Amersham, Buckinghamshire, England Mary Lydia Appleford geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb im Juli 1577 im Alter von 80 Jahren in Cornhill St Michael, London, England und wurde in Wye, Kent, England begraben.

Lui sposato Mary Lydia Appleford circa 1512, nel Amersham, Buckinghamshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel luglio 1577, nel Cornhill St Michael, London, England, all'età di 80 anni, e fu sepolto a Wye, Kent, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Ralph Edward Myllesが約1498年にイギリスソメルセトで生まれた時，父Sir Robert Miles Iは36歳，母Matilda Alice Flandersは32歳であった。約1512年にイギリスブクインガムシュアイアエイメルシャムでMary Lydia Applefordと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1577年7月にイギリスロンドンコルンヒル スト ミチャエルで80歳で死去し，イギリスケントウイにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Ralph Edward Mylles(이)가 대략 1498년 영국 서머세트에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Robert Miles I(은)는 36세였고, 그의 어머니 Matilda Alice Flanders(은)는 32세였다. 그는 대략 1512년 영국 벅잉함실르 어머샤에서 Mary Lydia Appleford(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1577년 7월 영국 런던 코른힐 스트 믹하얼에서 80세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 켄트 윈예에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Ralph Edward Mylles nasceu aproximadamente 1498, em Somerset, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Robert Miles I, tinha 36 anos e sua mãe, Matilda Alice Flanders, tinha 32 anos. Ele casou-se com Mary Lydia Appleford aproximadamente 1512, em Amersham, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em julho de 1577, em Cornhill St Michael, London, Inglaterra, com 80 anos, e foi sepultado em Wye, Kent, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Ralph Edward Mylles родился около 1498 г. в местности сомирсет, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Robert Miles I было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Matilda Alice Flanders, 32. Он женился на женщине по имени Mary Lydia Appleford около 1512 г. в местности амиршам, буккингхамшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 2 дочери. Он умер июль 1577 г. в местности корнилл ст мачаел, Лондон, Англия в возрасте 80 лет и был похоронен в местности ви, кэнт, Англия.
